task_completion.description: Verify the 'External Auditor' role has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the name 'External Auditor' in the Roles and permissions administration list or on the role creation/edit screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the required permissions are enabled for the 'External Auditor' role.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the role edit/creation screen for 'External Auditor', look for checked boxes next to 'View project', 'View work packages', 'Add notes', 'View time entries', and 'View wiki'.

task_completion.description: Verify the forbidden permissions are disabled for the 'External Auditor' role.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the role edit/creation screen for 'External Auditor', look for UNCHECKED boxes next to 'Edit work packages', 'Log spent time', and 'Delete work packages'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the Members section of the 'E-Commerce Platform' project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'E-Commerce Platform' project header and the 'Members' tab or page being active.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Developer' role was removed from user 'Carol Williams'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'E-Commerce Platform' project members list, locate 'Carol Williams' and ensure the 'Developer' role badge or text is no longer present next to her name.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'External Auditor' role was assigned to user 'Carol Williams'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'E-Commerce Platform' project members list, locate 'Carol Williams' and ensure the 'External Auditor' role badge or text is present next to her name.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the OpenProject web interface rather than terminal commands or API scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the OpenProject application, not a terminal window executing curl, rails console, or database commands.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with genuine OpenProject UI elements.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for authentic OpenProject dropdowns, checkboxes, and save buttons being clicked, rather than text files or static HTML pages being edited.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the results.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the browser's Developer Tools (Inspect Element) panel is not open and being used to manually change text on the screen to read 'External Auditor'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Role Name: 'External Auditor'. Target Project: 'E-Commerce Platform' (identifier: ecommerce-platform). Target User: 'Carol Williams' (login: carol.williams). Required Permissions to be checked: 'View project', 'View work packages', 'Add notes' (add_work_package_notes), 'View time entries', 'View wiki' (view_wiki_pages). Forbidden Permissions to be unchecked: 'Edit work packages', 'Log spent time' (log_time), 'Delete work packages'.
